name: Wabtec Corporation
description: Wabtec Corporation is a leading global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services for the freight rail, passenger transit, mining, industrial, and marine industries. Headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, the company leverages over 155 years of experience to drive innovation in safety, efficiency, and sustainability. Wabtec is committed to revolutionizing transportation through advanced technologies, such as battery-electric locomotives and digital infrastructure, helping customers worldwide improve productivity while reducing their environmental impact. Their comprehensive portfolio supports the entire lifecycle of transportation assets, ensuring reliable and cleaner mobility for future generations.
